arts.ttl: Barcelona Gets Positive Injury Update for Key Player Ahead of Potential PSG Clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 win over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off on Tuesday night at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest pulls off a major comeback, PSG will face either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. This dominant performance […] The post Barcelona Gets Positive Injury Update for Key Player Ahead of Potential PSG Clash appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, PSG Poised to Rival Arsenal, Man Utd for €60M-Rated Serie A Star
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be in the market for a No. 9 this summer after loaning out Randal Kolo Muani to Juventus in January. With his departure, Gonçalo Ramos and Ousmane Dembélé have taken on the role up front. Kolo Muani has made an immediate impact in Italy, scoring five goals in his first three matches […] The post Aston Villa, PSG Poised to Rival Arsenal, Man Utd for €60M-Rated Serie A Star appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Ready to Make Bold Move for €60M-Rated PSG Midfielder This Summer
arts.sum: Under Luis Enrique, Paris Saint-Germain are bringing players ready to compete for minutes. No one is guaranteed minutes as a starter, which is what led to the permanent departure of Xavi Simons. Despite this philosophy, eventually, there will be players like Simons who feel that they want to be regular starters. As a result, there […] The post Liverpool Ready to Make Bold Move for €60M-Rated PSG Midfielder This Summer appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG Won’t Complete Move for £36M-Rated Liverpool Ace, Latest Report Says
arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar now at Fenerbahçe SK, Paris Saint-Germain could be on the lookout for a new center-back when the summer transfer window opens. Skriniar’s departure is permanent, so PSG will need to find a replacement. Last month, Anfield Watch reported that PSG are fully committed to signing Ibrahima Konaté. With uncertainty surrounding the defender’s […] The post PSG Won’t Complete Move for £36M-Rated Liverpool Ace, Latest Report Says appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Official | Gianluigi Donnarumma omitted from PSG squad to face Toulouse
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma (25) has been officially omitted from the Paris Saint-Germain squad that will travel south to face Toulouse FC this evening. Les Parisiens are looking to maintain their 10-point…

arts.ttl: Exclusive | Ibrahima Konaté links to PSG unfounded
arts.sum: Reports linking Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté (25) with a move to Paris Saint-Germain are “completely unfounded”, sources have told Get French Football News. ESPN reported on Friday that PSG had made a move for…

arts.ttl: Toulouse predicted XI v PSG: Frank Magri starts, Joshua King injured
arts.sum: Toulouse FC have been in a poor run of form since returning from the winter break at the start of January. The club are searching for their first victory in…

arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Toulouse: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia starts, Bradley Barcola benched
arts.sum: All signs are positive for Paris Saint-Germain as they travel south to face Toulouse FC. PSG are ten points clear at the top of the league over arch-rivals Olympique de Marseille…

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds ready to spend whatever it takes to sign PSG star Warren Zaire-Emery
arts.sum: Liverpool are prepared to spend whatever it takes to sign Warren Zaire-Emery from PSG, FootballTransfers in conjunction with AnfieldWatch understands. Liverpool are keeping tabs on the situation of Warren Zaire-Emery, PSG’s 18-year-old midfield star.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé is finally emerging as the star after years as a football piñata | Barney Ronay
arts.sum: PSG forward is among the world’s best players right now after years of being unfairly weighed down by narrative A few years ago a British newspaper published a thousand-word article about Ousmane Dembélé not going to a notorious Spanish sex club. The article featured 14 photos of the notorious sex club Dembélé had never been to, including one of a frightening sex-crucifix Dembélé had never been lashed to, and another of a Spiderman-style sex-net Dembélé would never find himself contorted around in the grip of tearful public ecstasy. There was even a greasy close-up of the sex-doorbell Dembélé would never furtively press, go anywhere near, or be aware of existing. Continue reading...
